messages.content: ok kind of a funny coincidence, i keep seeing this one little cafe pop up everywhere this week
That kind of thing has a way of catching attention. What's pulling you toward it — curiosity, or something more like a nudge?
like a friend mentioned it, then i walked past it, then it was in a show i was watching. three times
Three times in a week does feel like the universe underlining something. What's your instinct when you notice a pattern like that — do you usually follow it?
feels like the universe is nudging me to finally go check it out lol. i'm a little superstitious like that
There's something nice about having a reason to do the thing you were probably already a little curious about. What's been stopping you from just going?
i know it's just my brain noticing the same thing more, but it's a fun excuse to try a new spot
That's a good way to hold it — the pattern might be your own attention, but the café is still real and still worth trying. What kind of place is it?
gonna go this weekend and get whatever their signature drink is. small adventures, you know
Small adventures are underrated. I hope the drink lives up to the buildup.
